record.field: ["|", "&", "&", "&", ("rental_status", "=", "return"), ("rental_return_date", ">=", datetime.datetime.combine(context_today(), datetime.time(0, 0, 0)).to_utc().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")), ("rental_return_date", "<", datetime.datetime.combine(context_today() + relativedelta(days = 1), datetime.time(0, 0, 0)).to_utc().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")), ("state", "=", "sale"), "&", "&", "&", ("rental_status", "=", "pickup"), ("rental_start_date", ">=", datetime.datetime.combine(context_today(), datetime.time(0, 0, 0)).to_utc().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")), ("rental_start_date", "<", datetime.datetime.combine(context_today() + relativedelta(days = 1), datetime.time(0, 0, 0)).to_utc().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")), ("state", "=", "sale")]
